title: New clues to disease severity identified in alpha1-antitrypsin deficiency
summary_en: Researchers at WashU Medicine have identified a previously unknown cellular process that protects against liver disease caused by toxic protein buildup.
title_cn: 研究发现α1抗胰蛋白酶缺乏症疾病严重程度相关新线索

title: WashU to award seven honorary degrees during 165th Commencement
summary_en: WashU will confer seven honorary degrees during its 165th Commencement May 15. Here are the recipients.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学将在第165届毕业典礼上授予7项荣誉学位

title: Lee installed as inaugural Stickle professor
summary_en: Aaron Lee, MD, a nationally acclaimed vitreoretinal surgeon and leader in applying artificial intelligence to vision research and patient care, has been named the inaugural Arthur W. Stickle Distinguished Professor of Ophthalmology and Visual Sciences at WashU Medicine.
title_cn: 亚伦·Y·李就任华盛顿大学医学院首任亚瑟·W·斯蒂克尔眼科学与视觉科学杰出教授

title: Henson to retire as executive vice chancellor for university advancement
summary_en: Pamella A. Henson, executive vice chancellor for university advancement, will retire Jan. 4, concluding a distinguished career spanning 34 years at WashU and 40 years in the profession, according to Chancellor Andrew D. Martin.
title_cn: 《圣路易斯华盛顿大学大学发展事务执行副校长帕梅拉·A·亨森即将退休》

title: New initiative launches to save primates, transform global conservation approaches
summary_en: A $1.5 million pledge from Distinguished Trustee Andy Newman for the Living Earth Collaborative will support critically endangered primates. The new project aims to transform how biodiversity is documented, modeled and protected worldwide.
title_cn: 濒危灵长类信息协作项目正式启动 推动全球生物多样性保护模式变革

title: People with poor mental health report worse care worldwide
summary_en: WashU researchers find adults struggling with their mental health face more unmet needs and less trust in health systems.
title_cn: 全球多国研究显示心理健康状况不佳群体所获医疗服务质量普遍偏低

title: Global outbreaks may fuel violence against women — but most cases go unmeasured
summary_en: At WashU Public Health, researchers highlight how outbreaks strain households and systems, revealing hidden risks for women and girls that data often fails to capture.
title_cn: 研究表明全球传染病暴发或加剧针对妇女和女童的暴力行为 多数相关案件未被统计监测
